query: retro vintage faded film photograph melancholy nostalgia
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / muted_faded — retro film fade, nostalgic melancholy palette

response.objective_caption: A person wearing over-ear headphones and a light-colored long-sleeve shirt holds a vinyl record with both hands while looking down at it. Behind the person is a large vertical poster featuring a portrait of Bob Marley with the words "ONE LOVE" at the top and "MARLEY" along the bottom edge. The setting appears to be indoors against a light-colored wall.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A person wearing over-ear headphones and a light-colored shirt holds a vinyl record while looking down at it, standing before a large poster of Bob Marley emblazoned with "ONE LOVE" and "MARLEY". The photograph exhibits a muted, faded sepia palette with low vibrancy and a textured, grain-heavy analog film quality that lends an organic, archival feel to the scene.
